title: Korbond Threaded Needle Kit - 110495
features: Korbond handy multi-purpose threaded needle kit
Contains an assortment of 10 pre-threaded needles
This compact kit is ideal for those on the move emergency repair
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair Threaded Needle Kit AVAILABLE NOW More Products From Korbond Care & Repair Sewing Kit - 15 pieces Sewing Bag - 40 pieces Starter Sewing Kits Korbond Care & Repair Threaded Needle Kit. Ready, Threaded, Go! Korbond Threaded Needle Kit contains 10 pre-threaded needles with assorted thread colours, 2 pearl buttons and a gilt safety pin. The kit is handy for those on the move emergency repairs. Contents Include: 10 pre-threaded needles in a mixture of popular colours. 2 pearl buttons. 1 handy safety pin. Handy Usages For Korbond Care & Repair Threaded Needle Kit. University Essentials A survival kit ‘must have’ for any student moving away from home. 10 needles pre-threaded with an assortment of threads in popular colours, making it as easy as possible to repair a tear or replace a button. Made Easy A complete mini sewing kit for the sewing adverse. An essential product for every household. 10 pre-threaded needles in popular shades ensure a close colour match to most clothing and upholstery. Perfect Gift Everybody needs a sewing kit. Threaded Needle Kits are a great small gift, or stocking filler, for students, busy mums, and business professionals, or anyone who requires quick and easy mend and repair solutions. Travel Companion An ideal travel companion for mending rips and unravels on the go. Don’t leave home without one. This pre-threaded needle kit is perfect for family holidays, business trips, or keeping in a desk draw/handbag.
